songs.title: Fresh Out the Slammer
songs.album: THE TORTURED POETS DEPARTMENT: THE ANTHOLOGY
feed: “Fresh Out the Slammer” by Taylor Swift reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Fresh Out the Slammer” by Taylor Swift reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 1 spot to #1.
“Fresh Out the Slammer” by Taylor Swift is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 111 sales units.
“Fresh Out the Slammer” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 205 streams units.
“Fresh Out the Slammer” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 10 airplay units.
“Fresh Out the Slammer” by Taylor Swift is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 412,020 total units.

songs.title: Read your Mind
feed: “Read your Mind” by Sabrina Carpenter reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 52 spots to #2.
“Read your Mind” by Sabrina Carpenter climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 52 spots to #2.
“Read your Mind” by Sabrina Carpenter is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 489% to 389 points.
“Read your Mind” by Sabrina Carpenter is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 52 spots to #2.
